audit_result.proof_trace: The transaction pool validates EIP-7702 transactions have non-empty authorization lists (L443) but never validates individual authorization chain_ids. While transaction-level chain_id is checked (L424-432), each SignedAuthorization has its own chain_id field that must match current_chain_id or be 0 per EIP-7702. The pool accepts transactions where auth.chain_id != current_chain_id.
audit_result.attack_scenario: Attacker crafts EIP-7702 transaction with valid tx.chain_id=1 (mainnet) but includes authorizations with auth.chain_id=999. Transaction passes pool validation and enters mempool, enabling cross-chain replay or execution of authorizations intended for different chains.

PROP-ff7df16a-inv-011.text: Authorization chain_id must match the target chain for replay protection.
PROP-ff7df16a-inv-011.assertion: forall auth in tx.authorizations: auth.chain_id == current_chain_id || auth.chain_id == 0
